name: Glow Beauty Studio
hours: Tuesday-Sunday, 10 AM to 8 PM. Closed Mondays.
location: Shop 4, Riverside Plaza, MG Road, Coimbatore.
services: Haircuts & styling, hair colour, facials, manicure & pedicure, and bridal packages.
pricing: Haircuts from ₹300, facials from ₹800, and bridal packages from ₹8,000. Exact pricing depends on the service - happy to share a full list!

faqs.q: Do you take walk-ins or do I need an appointment?
faqs.a: Walk-ins are welcome, but appointments are recommended on weekends as we get busy.
Yes, free customer parking is available behind Riverside Plaza.
We use professional, cruelty-free brands and have ammonia-free colour options.
We offer at-home bridal and party packages within the city for an additional travel charge.
